member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.GitHelper
member.summary: Must be in Win because use powershell In shared cannot because win derife from shared. If I have abstract layer for shared, then yes

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.GitHelper.BaseUrlVisualStudioGit
member.summary: Base URL for Visual Studio git repository pattern 1 https://radekjancik.visualstudio.com/_git/AllProjectsSearch

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.GitHelper.BaseUrlVisualStudioPrefix
member.summary: Base URL prefix for Visual Studio git repository pattern 2 https://radekjancik@dev.azure.com/radekjancik/CodeProjects_Bobril/_git/CodeProjects_Bobril

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.GitHelper.GitPathSuffix
member.summary: Git path suffix for pattern 2

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.GitHelper.BaseUrlVisualStudioShort
member.summary: Base URL prefix for Visual Studio repository pattern 3 https://radekjancik.visualstudio.com/AllProjectsSearch.ToNet5/_git/AllProjectsSearch.ToNet5

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.GitHelper.BaseUrlGitHub
member.summary: Base URL for GitHub repositories https://github.com/sunamo/sunamo.git

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.GitHelper.BaseUrlAzureDevOps
member.summary: Base URL for Azure DevOps git repositories https://dev.azure.com/radekjancik/_git/sunamo.webWithoutDep

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.GitHelper.BaseUrlBitbucket
member.summary: Base URL for Bitbucket repositories https://bitbucket.org/sunamo/1gp-gopay-master

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.GitHelper.PowershellForPull(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Generates a PowerShell/Git bash script to pull updates from all specified folders.
member.param: List of repository folder paths to pull from.
member.returns: Generated bash script content for pulling all repositories.

member.summary: Pushes changes for a solution to the remote repository, including status check and commit.
member.param: Whether this is a release build push.
Git bash builder for generating git commands.
Additional arguments for the push command.
Full path to the solution folder.
Data about the push operation status.
Git bash builder for status commands.
Function to invoke PowerShell commands and return their output.
member.returns: True if the push was successful.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.GitHelper.NameOfRepoFromOriginUri(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts repository name from git origin URI
member.returns: Repository name extracted from the URI

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.Ignored
member.summary: Determines whether project paths should be ignored based on naming conventions.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.Ignored.IsIgnored(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the specified path should be ignored (archived, UAP, mixin, or vcxproj).
member.returns: True if the path should be ignored.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.Ignored.StartWith
member.summary: Path prefixes that indicate ignored projects.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.Ignored.StartWith.Uap
member.summary: UAP (Universal App Platform) project folder marker.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.Ignored.StartWith.Archived
member.summary: Archived project folder marker.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.Ignored.StartWith.Mixin
member.summary: Mixin project folder marker.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.Ignored.EndsWith
member.summary: File extensions that indicate ignored projects.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.Ignored.EndsWith.VcxProj
member.summary: Visual C++ project file extension.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.XmlDocumentsCache
member.summary: Cache for XML documents (typically csproj files) to avoid repeated parsing.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.XmlDocumentsCache.Type
member.summary: Type reference for this class.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.XmlDocumentsCache.Cache
member.summary: Dictionary caching parsed XmlDocuments keyed by file path.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.XmlDocumentsCache.ProjectDeps
member.summary: In key is csproj path In value is absolute path of references (recursive)

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.XmlDocumentsCache.BuildProjectsDependencyTreeList
member.summary: Delegate for building the project dependency tree from a csproj path and cache.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.XmlDocumentsCache.Nulled
member.summary: Count of csproj files that were null (ignored or failed to load).

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.XmlDocumentsCache.Clpb
member.summary: Optional progress bar for displaying cache loading progress.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.XmlDocumentsCache.CantBeLoadWithDictToAvoidCollectionWasChangedButCanWithNull
member.summary: List of paths that cannot be loaded with a dictionary to avoid collection-was-changed exceptions.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.XmlDocumentsCache.Get(System.String)
member.summary: Nemůže se volat společně s .Result! viz. https://stackoverflow.com/a/65820543/9327173 Způsobí to deadlock! Musím to dělat přes ThisApp.async_ Can return null during many situations For example when ignored => must always checking for null
member.param: Path to the csproj file to load or retrieve from cache.
member.returns: Result containing the parsed XmlDocument or an exception message.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.XmlDocumentsCache.BuildProjectDeps
member.summary: Builds a filtered dictionary containing only successfully loaded XML documents from the cache.
member.returns: Dictionary of valid XML documents keyed by csproj path.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.XmlDocumentsCache.BadXml
member.summary: Returns paths of projects with invalid XML.
member.returns: List of project paths with null XmlDocument values.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.XmlDocumentsCache.Set(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets or updates a cached XML document from raw XML content, optionally saving to disk.
member.param: Whether to also write the document to disk.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.XmlDocumentsCache.Set(System.String,System.Xml.XmlDocument,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets or updates a cached XML document, optionally saving to disk.
member.param: Whether to also write the document to disk.

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Args.GetCsprojsArgs
member.summary: Arguments for getting csproj files.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Args.GetCsprojsArgs.OnlyNames
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to return only names with extension.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Args.GetCsprojsArgs.ForceReload
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to force reload.

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.Project.ProjectFolderSerialize
member.summary: Represents a project folder for serialization. TODO: Merge with SolutionInListBox

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.Project.ProjectFolderSerialize.displayedText
member.summary: Is filled in constructor.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.Project.ProjectFolderSerialize.Solution
member.summary: Gets the solution folder.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.Project.ProjectFolderSerialize.NameProject
member.summary: Gets the project name.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.Project.ProjectFolderSerialize.#ctor(SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderSerialize,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.Project.ProjectFolderSerialize.ToString
member.summary: Returns the displayed text for this project.
member.returns: The displayed text.

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.Project.ProjectFoldersSerialize
member.summary: Collection of project folders for serialization.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.Project.ProjectFoldersSerialize.Projects
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of projects.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.Project.ProjectFoldersSerialize.GetWithName(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets project folders by their names.
member.param: List of project names to find.
Determines whether to allow missing projects without throwing an exception.
member.returns: Result containing found project folders or exception if projects are missing and not allowed.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.Project.ProjectFoldersSerialize.RemoveWithName(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Removes projects with specified names.
member.param: List of project names to remove.

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder
member.summary: Represents a solution folder with projects and modules.
Partial class containing additional methods for SolutionFolder.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.Type
member.summary: Gets the type of SolutionFolder class.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.GetCsprojs(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder,SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Args.GetCsprojsArgs)
member.summary: Returns csproj full paths in subfolders of solution folder (one depth). Must use SolutionFolder, because in CreateSolutionFolder is filled projects variable. From every folder all csproj files are taken.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.#ctor(SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderSerialize)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from serialized data.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.TypeProjectFolder
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of project folder (C# Projects, PHP PHP_Projects, etc.).

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.UpdateModules(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,SunamoDevCode.PpkOnDriveDC)
member.summary: Updates modules in the solution.
member.param: PPK on drive for selling modules.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.SourceOfProjects
member.summary: Gets or sets the source of projects (SolutionFolder.GetCsprojs or SolutionsIndexerHelper.ProjectsInSolution).

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.ProjectsInSolution
member.summary: Gets or sets projects in solution. Only name without path. Is filled in constructor with CreateSolutionFolder(). Only subfolders. Csproj files must be found out manually. Csproj are available to get with GetCsprojs().

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.ProjectsGetCsprojs
member.summary: Gets or sets projects from SolutionFolder.GetCsprojs method.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.ModulesSelling
member.summary: Gets or sets modules for selling in format solution name\project name\module name.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.ModulesNotSelling
member.summary: Gets or sets modules not for selling in format solution name\project name\module name.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.NameSolutionWithoutDiacritic
member.summary: Gets or sets the solution name without diacritics.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.CountOfImages
member.summary: Gets or sets the count of images in the solution.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.InVsFolder
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the solution is in Visual Studio folder.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.Repository
member.summary: Gets or sets the repository location.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.SlnNameWithoutExtension
member.summary: Gets or sets the solution name without extension.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.ToString
member.summary: Returns the string representation of the solution folder.
member.returns: String representation including image count if present.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.op_GreaterThan(SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder,SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder)
member.summary: Compares two solution folders by their image count.
member.returns: True if left has more images than right.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.op_LessThan(SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder,SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder)
member.summary: Compares two solution folders by their image count.
member.returns: True if left has fewer images than right.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.ExeToRelease(SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the path to the executable to be released.
member.param: Whether to create standalone solution for project.
Whether to add protected when selling.
member.returns: Path to the executable or null if not found.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.FindHighestAvailableNetVersion(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Finds the highest available .NET version folder starting from net15.0 and going down.
member.param: True for net*-windows, false for net*.
member.returns: Full path to the found folder or null if none exists.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.FindExistingFolderWithRightArchitecture(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Finds existing folder with the right architecture (win-x64 or win-x86).
member.returns: Directory path if found, otherwise null.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder.HaveGitFolder
member.summary: Checks whether the solution folder has a .git folder.
member.returns: True if .git folder exists, otherwise false.

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderSerialize
member.summary: Serializable solution folder data.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderSerialize.ToString
member.summary: Returns the displayed text for this solution folder.
member.returns: Displayed text.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderSerialize.Type
member.summary: Gets the type of SolutionFolderSerialize class.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderSerialize.DisplayedText
member.summary: Gets or sets the displayed text in listbox, e.g., 2013/PHP Projects/PHPWebSite. Is assigned in FoldersWithSolutions.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderSerialize._FullPathFolder
member.summary: Gets or sets the full path to folder (internal backing field).

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderSerialize._NameSolution
member.summary: Gets or sets the solution name (internal backing field).

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderSerialize.projectFolder
member.summary: Gets or sets the project folder. Defaultly null. Is filled up in SolutionsIndexerHelper.GetProjectFolderAndSlnPath. Scripts_Projects and so.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderSerialize.slnFullPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the solution full path. Is not full path to sln folder, for this reason there's _FullPathFolder. Is filled up in AllProjectsSearchHelper.GetProjectFolderAndSlnPath. _Uap/apps - relative path to solution folder from Project folder.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderSerialize.FullPathFolder
member.summary: Gets or sets the full path to folder (e.g., C:\Documents\vs\sunamo\). Path to folder must have backslash at the end, like folder variables in all my applications. Full path to solution, must be in separate variable and can't be computed from DisplayedText, because there are special folders that may be in C:\Mona and not in documents.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderSerialize.NameSolution
member.summary: Gets the final solution name, e.g., PHPWebSite. If contains hierarchy (as _Uap, won't be included).

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderSerialize.RunOne
member.summary: Gets the full path to folder for RunOne operation.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderSerialize.ShortName
member.summary: Gets the short name (solution name).

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderSerialize.LongName
member.summary: Gets the long name (full path to folder).

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderWithFiles
member.summary: Solution folder with file information.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderWithFiles.Files
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of all files in the solution.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderWithFiles.FilesOfExtension
member.summary: Gets or sets the dictionary of files grouped by extension (without dot).

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderWithFiles.FilesAndSizes
member.summary: Gets or sets the dictionary mapping file index to file size.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderWithFiles.SizeOfExtensionTypes
member.summary: Gets or sets the dictionary of total size by extension type.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderWithFiles.SizeOfExtension
member.summary: Gets or sets the dictionary of total size by extension (all extensions are lowercase and without dot).

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderWithFiles.OverallSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the overall size of all files.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderWithFiles.FileInfoLiteOfExtension
member.summary: Gets or sets the dictionary of FileInfoLite objects grouped by extension. Is filled in method CreateFileInfoLiteObjects.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderWithFiles.#ctor(SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderWithFiles.CheckSize
member.summary: Checks and calculates the total size of files.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderWithFiles.CreateFileInfoLiteObjects(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates FileInfoLite objects for the specified extension.

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFoldersNs.SolutionFolders
member.summary: Collection of solution folders with indexing support.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFoldersNs.SolutionFolders.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IList{SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFoldersNs.SolutionFolders.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the solution folder by solution name.
member.returns: Solution folder with the specified name.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFoldersNs.SolutionFolders.DoIndex
member.summary: Creates an index of solution folders by their solution name.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFoldersNs.SolutionFolders.IsAllNamesUnique(System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.String})
member.summary: Checks if all solution names are unique and throws exception if duplicates are found.
member.param: Optional list of names to check. If null, uses solution names from this collection.

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFoldersNs.SolutionFoldersSerialize
member.summary: Serializable collection of solution folders

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFoldersNs.SolutionFoldersSerialize.SolutionFolders
member.summary: List of serializable solution folders.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFoldersNs.SolutionFoldersSerialize.Insert(System.Int32,SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderSerialize)
member.summary: Inserts a solution folder at specified index, maintaining max 10 items

member.name: E:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFoldersNs.SolutionFoldersSerialize.Updated
member.summary: Event raised when the solution folders collection is updated.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFoldersNs.SolutionFoldersSerialize.RemoveWithDisplayedText(System.String)
member.summary: Removes all solution folders with specified displayed text

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFoldersNs.SolutionFoldersSerialize.Update
member.summary: Raises the Updated event with the current solution folders.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFoldersNs.SolutionFoldersSerialize.GetWithName(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets solution folders by name with optional error handling If isMissingAllowed is false and solution can't be found, saves exception in result Otherwise saves null in result Data
member.param: If false, throws exception when solution not found
member.returns: Result with found solution folders or exception

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFoldersNs.SolutionFoldersSerialize.RemoveWithName(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Removes solution folders with specified names

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes
member.summary: Defines the types of projects based on their platform, technology, or organizational category.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.OnlyWindowsCore
member.summary: Projects targeting only Windows with .NET Core.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.NotCore_Projects
member.summary: Projects that do not target .NET Core.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.ForkedOnGitHub
member.summary: Projects forked from GitHub repositories.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Azure
member.summary: Azure cloud service projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Jenkins
member.summary: Jenkins continuous integration projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Bobril
member.summary: Bobril framework projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.C
member.summary: C language projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Cpp
member.summary: C++ language projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Chrome
member.summary: Chrome extension or Chrome-related projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Code
member.summary: Visual Studio Code extension projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Css
member.summary: CSS stylesheet projects.

member.summary: Dart language projects.

member.summary: Docker container projects.

member.summary: Exercism coding exercise projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Go
member.summary: Go language projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Haskell
member.summary: Haskell language projects.

member.summary: Java language projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.JavaScript
member.summary: JavaScript language projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Mono
member.summary: Mono framework projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Node
member.summary: Node.js projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.NotUsed
member.summary: Projects that are no longer in use.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.NotCore
member.summary: Projects that do not target .NET Core.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.NotCoreWeb
member.summary: Web projects that do not target .NET Core.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.PHP
member.summary: PHP language projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Cs
member.summary: C# language projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Python
member.summary: Python language projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.ReactAdvanced
member.summary: Advanced React framework projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.ReactNative
member.summary: React Native mobile framework projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.React
member.summary: React framework projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Redux
member.summary: Redux state management projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Ruby
member.summary: Ruby language projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Scripts
member.summary: Script-based projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Sql
member.summary: SQL database projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Telmax
member.summary: Telmax company projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Trask
member.summary: Trask company projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.TypeScript
member.summary: TypeScript language projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Vue
member.summary: Vue.js framework projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Xamarin
member.summary: Xamarin mobile framework projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.ForkedGithub
member.summary: Projects forked from GitHub (alternative naming).

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.NotMine
member.summary: Projects not owned by the current user.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.NovantaOld
member.summary: Old Novanta company projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Novanta
member.summary: Novanta company projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.None
member.summary: No specific project type assigned.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes.Unknown
member.summary: Unknown project type when Projects folder is not paired.

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.SourceOfProjects
member.summary: SolutionFolder.GetCsprojs. SolutionsIndexerHelper.ProjectsInSolution

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.SourceOfProjects.GetCsprojs
member.summary: AllProjectsSearchHelper Return csproj full paths in subfolders of A1 (one depth)

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.SourceOfProjects.ProjectsInSolution
member.summary: SolutionsIndexerHelper Find as subfolders (is not guarantee in subfolder will be .csproj). Can remove VS folders and return only names

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions
member.summary: Manages a collection of solution folders and provides methods for enumerating projects across all solutions.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.Solutions
member.summary: EN: Was static on 3-10-23 but don't know why when solutions is instance field CZ: 3-10-23 bylo static ale nevím proč když solutions je instanční

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.DocumentsFolder
member.summary: EN: Path to documents folder, e.g., D:\Documents CZ: D:\Documents

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.UsedRepository
member.summary: Gets or sets the repository type used for solution lookups.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.IdentifyProjectType(System.String,System.String,SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder)
member.summary: Identifies and sets the project type for a solution folder based on its path within the documents folder.
member.param: Full path to the solution folder.
Solution folder data object to update with project type information.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.Fwss
member.summary: EN: Folder where to search for Projects folder and Visual Studio folders. Added here when calling FoldersWithSolutions ctor. If no sln, call new FoldersWithSolutions(BasePathsHelper.Vs, null); CZ: Složka ve které se má hledat na složku Projects a složky Visual Studia. Přidává se mi zde když volám ctor FoldersWithSolutions. Pokud nemám sln, zavolat new FoldersWithSolutions(BasePathsHelper.Vs, null);

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.InsertIntoFwss(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,SunamoDevCode.PpkOnDriveDC,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a new FoldersWithSolutions instance and adds it to the global Fwss list.
member.param: Whether to also load solution folders.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,SunamoDevCode.PpkOnDriveDC,System.Boolean)
member.summary: A1 = D:\Documents This class should be instaniate only once and then call reload by needs A1 toSelling can be null

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.#ctor(SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions)
member.summary: Creates a copy of another FoldersWithSolutions instance, sharing the same solutions and static data.
member.param: Source instance to copy data from.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.SolutionsWithFiles
member.summary: Wraps each solution folder into a SolutionFolderWithFiles object for file-level access.
member.returns: List of solution folders with file information.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.Reload(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,SunamoDevCode.PpkOnDriveDC)
member.summary: Gets all projects in the documents folder (Visual Studio Projects) and GitHub folder, rebuilding the solutions list.
member.param: Path to the documents folder containing project directories.
member.returns: List of loaded solution folders.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.PairProjectFolderWithEnum(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Pairs project folder names with their corresponding ProjectsTypes enum values by scanning the documents folder.
member.param: Path to the documents folder to scan for project directories.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.OnlyRealLoadedSolutionsFolders
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of solution folder paths that were actually loaded from disk.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.allCsprojGlobal
member.summary: EN: In key is filename without .csproj, in value is full path CZ: V klíči je jméno souboru bez .csproj, v hodnotě je úplná cesta
Gets or sets the global dictionary mapping csproj filenames (without extension) to their full paths.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.AllGlobalCsprojs(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Builds and returns the global dictionary of all csproj files across all solution folders.
member.param: If true, lists duplicates instead of throwing an exception.
member.returns: Dictionary mapping csproj filenames to their full paths, or null if not found.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.ProjectsWithDuplicateName
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of project names that have duplicate entries across solutions.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.IsAllProjectNamesUnique(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Checks whether all project names in the global csproj dictionary are unique.
member.param: If true, collects duplicate paths instead of throwing.
member.returns: True if all project names are unique.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.CreateSolutionFolder(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderSerialize,SunamoDevCode.PpkOnDriveDC,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a SolutionFolder from a serialized solution folder data object.
member.returns: A new SolutionFolder instance.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.CreateSolutionFolder(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String,SunamoDevCode.PpkOnDriveDC,System.String)
member.summary: toSelling can be null
member.returns: Created SolutionFolder.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.CreateSolutionFolder(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolderSerialize,System.String,SunamoDevCode.PpkOnDriveDC,System.String)
member.summary: toSelling can be null
Creates a SolutionFolder from a SolutionFolderSerialize and path
member.param: Serialized solution folder data (can be null)
member.returns: Created SolutionFolder

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.GetDisplayedName(System.String)
member.summary: Get name based on relative but always fully recognized project

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.SolutionsUap(System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.String})
member.summary: Returns UAP (Universal App Platform) solutions from the VS17 repository.
member.returns: List of UAP solution folders.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.SolutionsWildcard(SunamoDevCode.Enums.RepositoryLocal,System.String)
member.summary: Gets solutions matching a wildcard pattern
member.returns: List of matching solutions

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.GetSolutions(SunamoDevCode.Enums.RepositoryLocal,System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.String})
member.summary: Gets solutions from repository with optional filtering Excludes from SolutionsIndexerConsts.SolutionsExcludeWhileWorkingOnSourceCode if Debugger is attached and !loadAll skipThese can use wildcard patterns
member.param: If false and debugger attached, excludes working solutions
member.returns: Filtered list of solutions

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.ReturnAllProjectFolders(System.String[])
member.summary: Returns full paths for all project folders recursively - specific and ordinary
member.returns: List of project folder paths

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.ReturnNormalAndSpecialFolders(System.String)
member.summary: Separates folders into normal and special (starting with _)
member.returns: Tuple of (normal folders, special folders)

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.ReturnNormalAndSpecialFolders(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String}@,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String}@)
member.summary: Separates subfolders into those starting with _ (special) and others (normal)

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.AddProjectsFolder(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Finds usual folders and special folders (starting with _) and processes them recursively
member.param: List to add project folders to

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.FullPathFolders(SunamoDevCode.Enums.RepositoryLocal,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Gets full path folders from repository
member.param: Optional filter for specific solution names
member.returns: List of full path folders

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions.FullPathFolders(SunamoDevCode.Enums.RepositoryLocal,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Gets full path folders from repository with optional solution folder mapping
member.param: Optional dictionary to populate with solution folder mappings
Optional filter for specific solution names
member.returns: List of full path folders

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutionsList
member.summary: List of FoldersWithSolutions instances

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutionsList.Add(SunamoSolutionsIndexer.FoldersWithSolutions)
member.summary: Adds a FoldersWithSolutions instance to the list

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.IFoldersWithSolutions
member.summary: Interface for managing folders containing Visual Studio solutions

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.IFoldersWithSolutions.Solutions(SunamoDevCode.Enums.RepositoryLocal,System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.String},SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Enums.ProjectsTypes)
member.summary: Gets solution folders from repository with optional filtering
member.param: If false and debugger attached, excludes working solutions
Project type to prioritize in results
member.returns: Collection of solution folders

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Interfaces.ISolutionFolder
member.summary: Interface for solution folder operations

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Interfaces.ISolutionFolder.ProjectsGetCsprojs
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of csproj file paths in this solution.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Interfaces.ISolutionFolder.ProjectsInSolution
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of project names referenced in the solution file.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Interfaces.ISolutionFolder.TypeProjectFolder
member.summary: Gets or sets the project type classification for the folder.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Interfaces.ISolutionFolder.ExeToRelease(SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Data.SolutionFolderNs.SolutionFolder,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns the path to the release executable for this solution.
member.param: Whether this is a standalone sln for a single project.
Whether to add protection when selling.
Whether this is for a publish operation.
member.returns: Path to the release executable.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Interfaces.ISolutionFolder.HaveGitFolder
member.summary: Determines whether this solution folder contains a .git directory.
member.returns: True if a .git folder exists.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Interfaces.ISolutionFolder.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the solution folder.
member.returns: String representation.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Interfaces.ISolutionFolder.UpdateModules(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,SunamoDevCode.PpkOnDriveDC)
member.summary: Updates git submodules for this solution.

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Interfaces.ISolutionFolderSerialize
member.summary: Interface for serializable solution folder data

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Interfaces.ISolutionFolderSerialize.DisplayedText
member.summary: Gets or sets the text displayed in UI for this solution folder.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Interfaces.ISolutionFolderSerialize.FullPathFolder
member.summary: Gets or sets the full path to the solution folder on disk.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Interfaces.ISolutionFolderSerialize.LongName
member.summary: Gets the long name of the solution (typically includes parent folder).

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Interfaces.ISolutionFolderSerialize.NameSolution
member.summary: Gets the solution name (folder name).

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Interfaces.ISolutionFolderSerialize.RunOne
member.summary: Gets the command to run/launch this solution.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Interfaces.ISolutionFolderSerialize.ShortName
member.summary: Gets the short name of the solution.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.Interfaces.ISolutionFolderSerialize.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the solution folder.
member.returns: String representation.

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.ProjectsNames
member.summary: Project name constants

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.ProjectsNames.SunamoWeb
member.summary: Project name for sunamo.web.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.ProjectsNames.PlatformIndependentNuGetPackages
member.summary: Project name for PlatformIndependentNuGetPackages.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.ProjectsNames.Sunamo
member.summary: Project name for sunamo.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.ProjectsNames.CredentialsWithoutDep
member.summary: Project name for CredentialsWithoutDep.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.ProjectsNames.All
member.summary: List of all known project names.

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.SolutionsIndexerConsts
member.summary: Constants used by the solutions indexer system.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.SolutionsIndexerConsts.BitBucket
member.summary: Identifier for the BitBucket repository source.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.SolutionsIndexerConsts.ProjectsFolderName
member.summary: Default folder name used for storing projects.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.SolutionsIndexerConsts.VisualStudio
member.summary: Display name for Visual Studio.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.SolutionsIndexerConsts.SolutionsExcludeWhileWorkingOnSourceCode
member.summary: List of solution names to exclude while working on source code in debugger mode.

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.SolutionsIndexerHelper
member.summary: Helper methods for solution indexing, finding, and managing projects within solutions.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.SolutionsIndexerHelper.SolutionWithName(System.String)
member.summary: Finds a solution folder by name. Can also accept web names like apps.sunamo.cz.
member.param: Solution name or web address to find.
member.returns: Matching solution folder or null if not found.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.SolutionsIndexerHelper.IsTheSolutionsFolder(System.String)
member.summary: not full path, only name of folder for more accurate deciding

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.SolutionsIndexerHelper.ProjectsInSolution(System.Boolean,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Finds projects as subfolders with optional VS folder removal and name-only mode
member.param: If true, removes Visual Studio temp folders
If true, returns only folder names; if false, returns full paths
member.returns: List of project folders

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.SolutionsIndexerHelper.RemoveVsFolders(System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Removes Visual Studio temp folders from list

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.SolutionsIndexerHelper.GetDisplayedSolutionName(System.String)
member.summary: Builds a display-friendly solution name by combining parent folder names up to the solutions root.
member.param: Full path to the solution folder.
member.returns: Slash-separated display name for the solution.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.SolutionsIndexerHelper.ModulesInSolution(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,System.Boolean,SunamoDevCode.PpkOnDriveDC)
member.summary: Gets modules in solution from UserControl/UC/UserControls folders
member.param: If true, returns only selling modules
member.returns: List of module paths

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.SolutionsIndexerHelper.AddModules(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean,SunamoDevCode.PpkOnDriveDC)
member.summary: Adds modules from path to result list based on selling configuration result and isSelling parameters are paired
member.param: If true, adds only selling modules; if false, adds non-selling modules

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.SolutionsIndexerPaths
member.summary: Paths to data files used by the solutions indexer.

member.summary: Path to the VPS new solutions list file.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.SolutionsIndexerPaths.listSczAdmin64
member.summary: Path to the SczAdmin64 solutions list file.

member.summary: Settings for Solutions Indexer.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.SolutionsIndexerSettings.IgnorePartAfterUnderscore
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to ignore the part after underscore when processing solution names.

member.summary: String constants for Solutions Indexer.

member.summary: Visual Studio 2017 folder name.

member.summary: GitHub folder name.

member.summary: GitHubMy folder name.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.SolutionsIndexerStrings.BitBucket
member.summary: BitBucket folder name.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.SolutionsIndexerStrings.ProjectPostfix
member.summary: Project postfix suffix.

member.name: F:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.SolutionsIndexerStrings.WithDirectSolutions
member.summary: Is used to get relative paths.

member.name: T:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.VpsHelperDevCode
member.summary: Helper class for VPS-related operations with DevCode solutions.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.VpsHelperDevCode.ListVpsNew
member.summary: Gets the list of VPS new solutions.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.VpsHelperDevCode.ListSczAdmin64
member.summary: Gets the list of SCZ Admin64 solutions.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.VpsHelperDevCode.PushAll(System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Threading.Tasks.Task{System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String}}}})
member.summary: Pushes all solutions to VPS.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.VpsHelperDevCode.PushPullAll(System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Threading.Tasks.Task{System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String}}}})
member.summary: Pushes or pulls all solutions.
member.returns: Git bash commands as string.

member.name: P:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.VpsHelperDevCode.PullAllResult
member.summary: Gets or sets the result of pull all operation.

member.name: M:SunamoSolutionsIndexer.VpsHelperDevCode.PullAll
member.summary: Pulls all solutions from VPS.
member.returns: PowerShell pull commands as string.
